name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you are requesting.

## Use Case

Describe the problem or scenario this feature addresses. Why is it needed?

## Proposed API

<!-- If applicable, sketch the API shape you have in mind -->

```kotlin
// proposed API sketch
```

## Platform Scope

<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Android
- [ ] Desktop (JVM)
- [ ] iOS
- [ ] Web
- [ ] All platforms

## Migration / Compatibility Notes

Would this be a breaking change? Any migration required for existing users?

## Alternatives Considered

Are there existing workarounds or alternative approaches you have tried?

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references related to the feature.
